sent_simp: 她不意间发现了这个秘密。
sent_trad: 她不意間發現了這個秘密。
pinyin: Tā bùyì jiān fāxiàn le zhège mìmì.

sent_simp: 我想提请大家注意这个问题。
sent_trad: 我想提請大家注意這個問題。
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng tíqǐng dàjiā zhùyì zhège wèntí.
english: I would like to bring this issue to everyone's attention.

sent_simp: 多年过去，他的生活一切如故。
sent_trad: 多年過去，他的生活一切如故。
pinyin: Duō nián guòqù, tā de shēnghuó yīqiè rúgù.
english: Many years have passed, but his life remains just as it was before.

sent_simp: 这台设备的总装工作在工厂完成。
sent_trad: 這台設備的總裝工作在工廠完成。
pinyin: Zhè tái shèbèi de zǒngzhuāng gōngzuò zài gōngchǎng wánchéng.
english: The final assembly of this equipment is done at the factory.

sent_simp: 十九世纪末，列强纷纷在中国设立租界。
sent_trad: 十九世紀末，列強紛紛在中國設立租界。
pinyin: Shíjiǔ shìjì mò, lièqiáng fēnfēn zài Zhōngguó shèlì zūjiè.
english: At the end of the 19th century, the Great Powers one after another set up concessions in China.

sent_simp: 这份报纸专门出了一个海外版给海外华人看。
sent_trad: 這份報紙專門出了一個海外版給海外華人看。
pinyin: Zhè fèn bàozhǐ zhuānmén chū le yī gè hǎiwàibǎn gěi hǎiwài Huárén kàn.
english: This newspaper published a special overseas edition for overseas Chinese readers.

sent_simp: 我想把余额宝里的钱提现到银行卡。
sent_trad: 我想把餘額寶裡的錢提現到銀行卡。
pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng bǎ Yú'é Bǎo lǐ de qián tíxiàn dào yínháng kǎ.
english: I want to withdraw the money in my Yu'e Bao to my bank card.

sent_simp: 他年轻时曾是一名优秀的国脚。
sent_trad: 他年輕時曾是一名優秀的國腳。
pinyin: Tā niánqīng shí céng shì yī míng yōuxiù de guójiǎo.
english: He was an excellent national football team player when he was young.

sent_simp: 离开多年后，他依然思念故国的山水。
sent_trad: 離開多年後，他依然思念故國的山水。
pinyin: Líkāi duō nián hòu, tā yīrán sīniàn gùguó de shānshuǐ.
english: Even after many years abroad, he still missed the landscapes of his homeland.

sent_simp: 公司今年招了五名实习生来帮忙。
sent_trad: 公司今年招了五名實習生來幫忙。
pinyin: Gōngsī jīnnián zhāo le wǔ míng shíxíshēng lái bāngmáng.
english: The company hired five interns this year to help out.

sent_simp: 他的绩效考核结果很好，今年奖金不少。
sent_trad: 他的績效考核結果很好，今年獎金不少。
pinyin: Tā de jìxiào kǎohé jiéguǒ hěn hǎo, jīnnián jiǎngjīn bùshǎo.
english: His performance review results were excellent, so his bonus this year is quite good.

sent_simp: 这款软件是商用版本，需要付费授权。
sent_trad: 這款軟件是商用版本，需要付費授權。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn ruǎnjiàn shì shāngyòng bǎnběn, xūyào fùfèi shòuquán.
english: This software is the commercial version and requires a paid license.

sent_simp: 他带病坚持来参加了婚礼。
sent_trad: 他帶病堅持來參加了婚禮。
pinyin: Tā dàibìng jiānchí lái cānjiā le hūnlǐ.
english: He pushed through his illness and came to attend the wedding.
